prompt: Build me an MCP server in TypeScript that exposes a tool called 'lookup_property' which takes an address string and returns property details. It should connect to a hypothetical REST API at https://api.properties.example/v1/lookup.
expectations: Creates a TypeScript project with package.json including @modelcontextprotocol/sdk dependency
Implements a Server instance with tools capability
Defines a lookup_property tool with an address input parameter
Includes handler that calls the external API endpoint
Includes configuration instructions for Claude Desktop or Claude Code (.mcp.json)
